title: Babylonian Talmud, Ketubot 17a: How Does One Dance Before the Bride?
description: Ketubot 17a: How Does One Dance Before the Bride?
introduction: Ketubot 17a: How Does One Dance Before the Bride?

translation.text: How does one dance before the bride? The school of Shammai says: Praise the bride as she actually is. The school of Hillel says: A beautiful and graceful bride. Beit Shammai said: Even if she is lame or blind?
